name: Phase 7: Metacognitive State Vector Integration
description: Implements Metacognitive State Vector architecture that converts LLM qualitative self-assessments into quantitative signals. When confidence drops below threshold, the system shifts from System 1 (fast) to System 2 (slow) reasoning, enabling dynamic model escalation.
researchBasis: Metacognitive State Vector architecture converts LLM qualitative self-assessments into quantitative signals. When confidence drops below threshold -> shift from System 1 (fast) to System 2 (slow) reasoning.

userStories.title: Add confidence tracking to DQ score calculations
userStories.description: As a user, I want the routing system to track confidence levels alongside DQ scores so that the system can detect when it is uncertain about its responses and take appropriate action.
acceptanceCriteria: DQ score calculation includes a confidence dimension (0.0-1.0)
Confidence is derived from response certainty signals (hedging language, qualifiers)
Confidence is logged alongside DQ scores in dq-scores.jsonl
Existing DQ scoring backwards compatible with new confidence field

userStories.title: Create metacognitive state type definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want well-defined TypeScript types for metacognitive state so that the system has a consistent interface for tracking cognitive states across components.
acceptanceCriteria: MetacognitiveState interface defines confidence, mode, timestamp, and trigger fields
System1Mode and System2Mode enums define reasoning modes
ConfidenceLevel type with granular levels (high, medium, low, very_low)
Types exported from a shared types module for reuse

userStories.title: Implement confidence threshold detection
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system to automatically detect when confidence drops below a configurable threshold so that it can trigger appropriate responses like model escalation.
acceptanceCriteria: Configurable confidence threshold (default: 0.6)
Real-time confidence monitoring during response generation
Threshold breach triggers callback/event for downstream handling
Threshold can be adjusted via config file or environment variable

userStories.title: Add model escalation logic (low confidence -> Opus)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system to automatically escalate to a more capable model (Opus) when confidence is low so that complex or uncertain queries get the reasoning power they need.
acceptanceCriteria: Low confidence (< 0.6) on Haiku triggers escalation to Sonnet
Low confidence (< 0.5) on Sonnet triggers escalation to Opus
Escalation is logged with reason and original confidence score
User can disable auto-escalation via configuration

userStories.title: Create metacognitive dashboard component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard view of metacognitive state so that I can monitor confidence levels, mode switches, and escalation events over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows current confidence level with visual indicator
Historical confidence trend chart (last 24 hours)
List of recent escalation events with timestamps and reasons
System 1/System 2 mode distribution pie chart

userStories.title: Add confidence history tracking to session state
userStories.description: As a user, I want confidence history persisted in session state so that I can analyze patterns and the system can learn from historical confidence data.
acceptanceCriteria: Confidence readings stored in session-state.json with timestamps
Rolling window of last 100 confidence readings maintained
Historical data includes query context, model used, and outcome
Export functionality for confidence history analysis

userStories.title: Implement System 1/System 2 mode indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which reasoning mode the system is using so that I understand whether it is operating in fast (System 1) or slow (System 2) mode.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI output shows current mode indicator [S1] or [S2]
Mode displayed alongside existing [DQ:X.XX C:X.XX] routing output
Mode transitions logged with timestamp and trigger reason
API endpoint returns current mode state

userStories.title: Add metacognitive alerts when mode switches
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be notified when the system switches between reasoning modes so that I am aware of significant cognitive state changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Alert triggered on System 1 -> System 2 transition
Alert includes reason for switch (low confidence, complex query, etc.)
Alerts can be configured: silent, console, or notification
Alert history accessible via dashboard or CLI command
